text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand images and videos. Two key tasks are image recognition, where a computer identifies what a picture shows, and object detection, which locates specific items within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, they can automatically tag photos or check products on a factory line. In self-driving cars, computer vision is essential. The car uses cameras to detect other vehicles, pedestrians, and traffic signs. This information helps the car make safe driving decisions. As the technology improves, more everyday uses are likely to emerge, from smart phones to healthcare systems.
